group_1.textRight: According to my manager,
getting political on my social media is a no-go...

group_1.textLeft: W-why...?

group_1.textRight: It seems like it would damage
the whole "SayuSayu" character~
For my side, I tried to tell her
that pretending I don't see what's going on...@is even worse, but...
She just stuck to her guns and said it's a no-go~...

group_1.textLeft: So that's how it is...

group_1.textRight: I'm sorry~

group_1.textLeft: No, I didn't think it through enough.@My apologies to you!
...By the way, being in a video call@with your manager―
Were you in the middle of working...?

group_1.textRight: Ah, I'm not on the clock.
It's just there's a new title to be@submitted by noon tomorrow
that I haven't decided on yet.
My manager is worried,
so she's just been discussing it with me at this hour.
I really want to help everyone out, though...
Sorry...

group_1.textLeft: My goodness, this late at night...
If I may, have you decided on your new song's title?

group_1.textRight: Unfortunately, in the end we couldn't decide...@So we gave up for the day.
I'm leaving it all to the Sayuki@of tomorrow mornii~iing.

group_1.textLeft: I-I see...@[chara:101301:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:101301:cheek_0][chara:101301:face_mtn_ex_010.exp3.json][chara:101301:lipSynch_1]Good work there.

group_1.textRight: Is that sooo. Sayuki's office gave the no-go...

group_1.textLeft: Well... It was a sensitive issue from the start...

group_1.textRight: Guess they figured carelessly touching on@that subject would start a flame war...

group_1.textLeft: That's right. And the reality is that@the risk is just too high.

group_1.textRight: But...It's not like we're saying anything wrong...
If anything they're in the wrong...

group_1.textLeft: It only seems that way to us.

group_1.textRight: To us...

group_1.textLeft: Compared to those who harass the East,@of course we seem to be right.
But you see, even if it seems@wrong to the public eye,
they have their own sincere reasons.

group_1.textRight: Reasons...

group_1.textLeft: To a young idol...@[chara:303601:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:303601:eyeClose_0][chara:303601:lipSynch_1]...Well, this is also biased,
but taking it as "giving a lighthearted denial@without properly understanding matters"
is just a fire waiting to ignite the wrong side...
So it may be something they can't help.

group_1.textRight: Then our sincere reason...@Is because we...

group_1.textLeft: What's up?

group_1.textRight: ...It's just a sudden thought, but...
On the contrary...why can I...@No, why can all of us Magical Girls,
whether East or West,
treat each other so normally without division?

group_1.textLeft: That's...

group_1.textRight: Why can we?
Is there some special power at work...?

group_1.textLeft: No, that seems a little...
Huh, is that it...?
